name: Poop Killer - Flush or Die
short_description: Bob and Case just wanted a quiet night… but fate (and a clogged toilet) had other plans. When a clueless friend ignores an important warning and decides to take a dump in a broken toilet, the nightmare begins.
detailed_description:
POOP KILLER IS BACK… AND THIS TIME, IT’S PERSONAL!

Get ready for a (disgusting) dive into true ‘80s trash horror! "Poop Killer - Flush or Die" brings back the filthiest killer of all time, now in a crazier, bloodier, and absolutely hilarious experience!

With an authentic VHS look, a gross-out horror atmosphere, and a ridiculously disturbing story, this game is a tribute to the golden era of trash horror, blending scares, guts, and toilet humor like never before!

If you already know the legend of the Poop Killer, you know he doesn’t forgive those who dirty the throne and run away without flushing… Now the question is: will you survive or become fertilizer?

SYNOPSIS:

Bob and Case just wanted a quiet night… but fate (and a clogged toilet) had other plans.

In the suburbs of New York, 1985, two weed dealers are enjoying their night with food, smoke, and settling a few scores. But when a clueless friend ignores an important warning and decides to take a dump in a broken toilet, the nightmare begins.

The Poop Killer has escaped from the asylum. He’s out there. And he doesn’t forgive.

Now, Bob and Case must survive a night of absolute insanity, where one wrong move could be their last.

FLUSH… OR DIE! 

GAMEPLAY:

Basically an immersive and atmospheric walking simulator with combat and first-person shooter elements. A return to the trash horror films of the 80s, with nostalgic visuals.

SURVIVAL MODE:

🚨 GET READY FOR INFINITE CHAOS!

The filthiest pizzeria in town is hiring, and YOU are the lucky new employee! But be warned... this job could lead to death (or worse).

Every task completed adds more time to the countdown, but letting things pile up will lead to GAME OVER! Plus, customer satisfaction is always at risk – crying kids, barking dogs, slow service… if the stress bar fills up, you’re doomed. 🏆 Become the best (or worst) employee Climb the Steam Leaderboards and unlock insane skins with Poop Jewels, which can also be used in Campaign Mode!

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Latin America, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian
*languages with full audio support
